title_en: 91. Be brave and start from now! (cont.)
content_en: This book was published in Arabic in Sha'ban 1428AH, corresponding to August 2007, and within the span of one year, it had sold 100,000 copies. As mentioned previously, Dr. Muhammad al-'Ariﬁis indigenously from Saudi Arabia. He is from the famous Arab tribe known as Banu Khalid (Banu Makhzum) − it goes without mentioning that Banu Khalid are the descendants of the famous soldier, Mujahid and Companion of the Prophet, Khalid bin al-Walid – may Allah be pleased with him. Dr. Muhammad bin 'Abd ar-Rahman al-'Ariﬁwas born in the year 1970.He graduated from Saudi universities where he acquired his PhD. The title of his PhD research thesis was "Ara' Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyya ﬁal-Suﬁyya – Jam' wa Dirasah" (The Views of Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah on Suﬁsm – a Compilation and Study). Currently, he is a founding and dignitary member of various Da'wah organisations, as well as being a member of their advisory committees. He is also a member of the advisory board for many international organisations. Aside from being a visiting professor in various Saudi and foreign universities, he is also a professor in King Saud University of Riyadh. He has been delivering Friday sermons for over twenty years in different mosques in Saudi Arabia. Currently, he delivers his Friday sermons in al-Bawaardi mosque, which is a major mosque located in the south of Riyadh. Every Friday, so many people attend, that it is impossible to ﬁnd a parking space anywhere in the vicinity of the mosque. Once I had the opportunity of praying the Friday prayer behind Dr. Al- 'Ariﬁ.We arrived at the mosque very early, but despite that, we had to park very far away. The ground ﬂoor of the mosque was fully occupied, so we went up to the ﬁrst ﬂoor where we were able to ﬁnd a place to sit. Soon afterwards, the ﬁrst ﬂoor also became congested with worshippers. Dr. Muhammad al-'Ariﬁis an amazing orator. He was fortunate enough to be a student of Shaykh 'Abd al-'Aziz bin Baz for ﬁfteen to sixteen years,and from whom he learnt Tafseer and Fiqh. For eight years, he took lessons from Dr. 'Abdullah al-Jibrin in tawhid. His other teachers include, Shaykh 'Abdullah bin Qu'ud, Shaykh 'Abd al-Rahman bin Nasir al-Barrak and various other scholars. His connections with the scholars of Madinah go back very far. During his days as a student and thereafter, he learnt Fiqh from those scholars. He has memorised the Qur'an and is known for his ﬁne recitation. He takes a special interest in hadith literature and has received licences for the chains of transmission for various hadith texts from a number of scholars. More than twenty of his works in Arabic have been published and distributed in nearly a million copies. His books, which are often published in four colours, are attractive and pleasing to the eye, and available at low-cost. It is because his books deal with issues affecting the lives of everyday people, that they are acclaimed and appreciated by all. Many well-wishers make his books their choice for their donations and free distributions. The following is a list of some of the works of Dr. Muhammad al-'Ariﬁ: - A work on tawhid called Irkab Ma'ana, an excellent work of which 400,000 copies have been published. - A work on Da'wah to Allah, called Hal Tabhath 'an Wadhifa, of which 150,000 copies have been published. - Innaha Malikah, in 150,000 copies. - Fi Batn al-Hut, in 150,000 copies. - A work on the topic of worship in 100,000 copies. - A work on the topic of Hijaab called Sarkha ﬁMat'am alJami'a, in 150,000 copies. - Rihla Ila al-Sama' with 150,000 copies published and sold. - A compilation of counselling to doctors and patients called 'Ashiq ﬁGhurfat al-'Amaliyat in 70,000 copies. - A pamphlet called Adhkar al-Muslim al-Yawmiyyah, of which 20 million copies have been published within only three years. Many of Dr. al-'Ariﬁ's lectures are available on the internet without charge; he also writes columns and essays for various newspapers and magazines and has appeared on a number of Arabic satellite television channels. The administration of Darussalam hopes, in the very near future, to translate into different languages and publish the various works of Dr. Al-'Ariﬁwhile maintaining a high literary standard, Allah willing. I would like to thank our brothers Saleem Beg and Nasim Chowdhury for translating and editing this work respectively. We pray to Allah that He grants the author, the translator and the editor good health and long life, and that He blesses their knowledge and actions. We would be extremely delighted to receive any feedback or suggestions from our readers, and we hope you remember us in your prayers. Your loving brother 'Abdul-Malik Mujahid Darussalam Publishers Riyadh - Saudi Arabia August 2008 Introduction All praise is due to Allah. May Allah's peace and blessings be upon the one after whom there is no other prophet.
content_id: Buku ini diterbitkan dalam bahasa Arab pada bulan Sya'ban 1428 H, bertepatan dengan Agustus 2007, dan dalam kurun waktu satu tahun, buku ini telah terjual sebanyak 100.000 eksemplar. Sebagaimana telah disebutkan sebelumnya, Dr. Muhammad al-'Arifi berasal dari Arab Saudi. Beliau berasal dari suku Arab terkenal yang dikenal sebagai Banu Khalid (Banu Makhzum). Sudah menjadi pengetahuan umum bahwa Banu Khalid adalah keturunan prajurit termasyhur, mujahid sekaligus sahabat Rasulullah, Khalid bin al-Walid radhiyallahu 'anhu. Dr. Muhammad bin 'Abd ar-Rahman al-'Arifi lahir pada tahun 1970 dan meraih gelar doktor dari universitas-universitas di Arab Saudi. Judul disertasi doktoralnya adalah "Ara' Syaikh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah fi al-Sufiyyah – Jam' wa Dirasah" (Pandangan Syaikhul Islam Ibnu Taimiyyah tentang Tasawuf – Kumpulan dan Kajian). Saat ini, beliau adalah anggota pendiri dan tokoh kehormatan berbagai organisasi dakwah, sekaligus anggota komite penasihat mereka. Beliau juga menjadi anggota dewan penasihat berbagai organisasi internasional. Selain sebagai profesor tamu di berbagai universitas Saudi dan luar negeri, beliau juga merupakan profesor di Universitas King Saud di Riyadh. Beliau telah menyampaikan khutbah Jumat selama lebih dari dua puluh tahun di berbagai masjid di Arab Saudi. Saat ini, beliau menyampaikan khutbah Jumat di Masjid al-Bawaardi, sebuah masjid besar yang terletak di selatan Riyadh. Setiap Jumat, begitu banyak jamaah yang hadir sehingga mustahil menemukan tempat parkir di sekitar masjid. Suatu kali saya berkesempatan melaksanakan salat Jumat bermakmum kepada Dr. Al-'Arifi. Kami tiba di masjid sangat awal, namun meski demikian, kami harus memarkir kendaraan sangat jauh. Lantai dasar masjid sudah penuh sesak, sehingga kami naik ke lantai pertama dan baru menemukan tempat duduk di sana. Tidak lama kemudian, lantai pertama pun dipenuhi jamaah. Dr. Muhammad al-'Arifi adalah seorang orator yang luar biasa. Beliau beruntung pernah menjadi murid Syaikh 'Abd al-'Aziz bin Baz selama lima belas hingga enam belas tahun, dan dari beliau ia mempelajari Tafsir dan Fiqh. Selama delapan tahun, ia mengikuti pelajaran tauhid dari Dr. 'Abdullah al-Jibrin. Guru-gurunya yang lain antara lain Syaikh 'Abdullah bin Qu'ud, Syaikh 'Abd al-Rahman bin Nasir al-Barrak, dan berbagai ulama lainnya. Hubungannya dengan para ulama Madinah sudah terjalin sangat lama. Semasa kuliah dan setelahnya, ia mempelajari Fiqh dari para ulama tersebut. Beliau telah menghafal Al-Qur'an dan dikenal karena bacaannya yang indah. Beliau sangat meminati literatur hadith dan telah mendapatkan izin sanad periwayatan berbagai kitab hadith dari sejumlah ulama. Lebih dari dua puluh karya beliau dalam bahasa Arab telah diterbitkan dan didistribusikan hampir mencapai satu juta eksemplar. Buku-bukunya, yang sering diterbitkan dengan empat warna, menarik dan enak dipandang, serta tersedia dengan harga terjangkau. Karena buku-bukunya membahas masalah-masalah yang memengaruhi kehidupan orang sehari-hari, maka buku-buku tersebut mendapat pengakuan dan apresiasi dari semua kalangan. Banyak dermawan yang menjadikan buku-buku beliau sebagai pilihan untuk disumbangkan dan didistribusikan secara gratis. Berikut adalah daftar sebagian karya Dr. Muhammad al-'Arifi: karya tentang tauhid berjudul Irkab Ma'ana yang telah diterbitkan sebanyak 400.000 eksemplar; karya tentang dakwah kepada Allah berjudul Hal Tabhath 'an Wadhifah yang telah diterbitkan 150.000 eksemplar; Innaha Malikah sebanyak 150.000 eksemplar; Fi Batn al-Hut sebanyak 150.000 eksemplar; sebuah karya tentang ibadah sebanyak 100.000 eksemplar; karya tentang hijab berjudul Sarkhah fi Mat'am al-Jami'ah sebanyak 150.000 eksemplar; Rihlah Ila al-Sama' yang telah diterbitkan dan terjual 150.000 eksemplar; kumpulan nasihat untuk dokter dan pasien berjudul 'Asyiq fi Ghurfat al-'Amaliyyat sebanyak 70.000 eksemplar; serta sebuah risalah berjudul Adzkar al-Muslim al-Yawmiyyah yang dalam tiga tahun saja telah diterbitkan sebanyak 20 juta eksemplar. Banyak ceramah Dr. al-'Arifi yang tersedia di internet secara gratis; beliau juga menulis kolom dan esai untuk berbagai surat kabar dan majalah, serta telah tampil di sejumlah saluran televisi satelit berbahasa Arab. Pihak manajemen Darussalam berharap, dalam waktu dekat, dapat menerjemahkan dan menerbitkan berbagai karya Dr. Al-'Arifi ke dalam berbagai bahasa dengan tetap menjaga standar sastra yang tinggi, insya Allah. Saya ingin mengucapkan terima kasih kepada saudara-saudara kami, Saleem Beg dan Nasim Chowdhury, yang masing-masing telah menerjemahkan dan menyunting karya ini. Kami berdoa kepada Allah agar Dia menganugerahkan kesehatan dan umur panjang kepada penulis, penerjemah, dan penyunting, serta memberkahi ilmu dan amal mereka. Kami akan sangat senang menerima masukan atau saran dari para pembaca, dan kami berharap Anda mendoakan kami. Saudara Anda yang penuh kasih, 'Abdul-Malik Mujahid, Darussalam Publishers, Riyadh, Arab Saudi, Agustus 2008. Pendahuluan. Segala puji bagi Allah. Semoga salawat dan salam Allah tercurah kepada orang yang setelahnya tidak ada nabi lain.
